anchor_review_targets.promotion_gate: Replace the seed with official land/access geometry or record guide/geospatial approval before publishing or gameplay use.
The corrected route must hit the published Chili Bar-to-Coloma station checkpoint before any Gorge or Folsom projection is trusted.
Attach an exact reviewed take-out/access point near the Folsom Reservoir reach before full-run stationing is promoted.

current_blockers: Current NHD bbox extract is pilot-only and not full reach.
Current production corridor is the 0-2.531 km Chili Bar slice.
Current alignment review records a 26.2 km candidate vs. 9.0 km Coloma checkpoint conflict.
Flow bands are attached but review-gated, not promoted gameplay bands.

exit_criteria: Full-reach official hydrography or 3DHP/NHD route selected and clipped.
Chili Bar, Coloma checkpoint, and Folsom take-out anchors reviewed.
All 20 rapid stations regenerated from corrected route geometry.
Flow windows reviewed against CDEC/USGS context and guide notes.
Corridor regression tests pass on stitched whole-window outputs.

review_envelope_policy.reason: The envelope intentionally over-covers Chili Bar, Coloma, the Gorge sequence, and the Folsom Reservoir approach so the next source pull cannot hide the current endpoint conflict.

route_solution_requirements.acceptance: One ordered route chain, no unexplained reversals or branch jumps, and every source segment preserves ID/provenance.
route_solution_requirements.requirement: Select a directed South Fork American mainstem graph from Chili Bar to Folsom Reservoir.

route_solution_requirements.acceptance: Route start/end are exact reviewed anchors, not the broad source download envelope or unreviewed access seeds.
route_solution_requirements.requirement: Clip route to reviewed Chili Bar and Folsom anchors.

route_solution_requirements.acceptance: Corrected station at Coloma is within 250 m of the published 9012.326 m checkpoint, or manual review remains blocked.
route_solution_requirements.requirement: Validate Coloma checkpoint before projecting Gorge rapids.

route_solution_requirements.acceptance: Every South Fork marker has exact route geometry and zero markers fall back to downstream-order interpolation.
route_solution_requirements.requirement: Project all 20 published rapid miles onto the corrected route.

route_solution_requirements.acceptance: Chili Bar, Coloma, Gorge, and Folsom windows are stitched for validation outputs; seams cannot hide physics or art errors.

preferred_products: 3DHP if available for the full envelope
NHDPlus HR only as supplemental network-order evidence
